id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0000
text: Energy reduction is a matter for the entire cloud chain. [Column](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/column.html). [Technology, Media & Telecom](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/technologie/index.html). ![Julia Krauwer](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/media/Julia_Krauwer_1278x538_tcm16-69446.jpg). 05/11/2020 • 4 minutes read. [Julia Krauwer](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/auteurs/julia-krauwer/index.html). It is not only data centres that should be concerned with reducing emissions and energy use. In fact, the entire chain should take responsibility for a greener digital landscape.

id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0002
text: Energy reduction is a matter for the entire cloud chain. [Column](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/column.html). [Technology, Media & Telecom](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/technologie/index.html). ![Julia Krauwer](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/media/Julia_Krauwer_1278x538_tcm16-69446.jpg). 05/11/2020 • 4 minutes read. [Julia Krauwer](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/auteurs/julia-krauwer/index.html). It is not only data centres that should be concerned with reducing emissions and energy use. In fact, the entire chain should take responsibility for a greener digital landscape. We consume digital services on our smartphones, laptops and TVs with great enthusiasm. A large share of those services runs from the cloud, or more concretely: on servers housed in mostly large-scale data centres.

metadata.chunk_id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0002

metadata.source_title: Energy reduction is a matter for the entire cloud chain

id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0003
text: It is not only data centres that should be concerned with reducing emissions and energy use. In fact, the entire chain should take responsibility for a greener digital landscape. We consume digital services on our smartphones, laptops and TVs with great enthusiasm. A large share of those services runs from the cloud, or more concretely: on servers housed in mostly large-scale data centres. With their prominent place in the landscape and substantial electricity consumption, data centres underline what we already knew: the digital economy does not run on thin air.

metadata.chunk_id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0003
metadata.source_slug: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten
metadata.source_title: Energy reduction is a matter for the entire cloud chain

id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0004
text: In fact, the entire chain should take responsibility for a greener digital landscape. We consume digital services on our smartphones, laptops and TVs with great enthusiasm. A large share of those services runs from the cloud, or more concretely: on servers housed in mostly large-scale data centres. With their prominent place in the landscape and substantial electricity consumption, data centres underline what we already knew: the digital economy does not run on thin air. As the unromantic embodiment of our digital economy, data centres are often a topic of debate.

metadata.chunk_id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0004
metadata.source_slug: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten
metadata.source_title: Energy reduction is a matter for the entire cloud chain

id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0005
text: We consume digital services on our smartphones, laptops and TVs with great enthusiasm. A large share of those services runs from the cloud, or more concretely: on servers housed in mostly large-scale data centres. With their prominent place in the landscape and substantial electricity consumption, data centres underline what we already knew: the digital economy does not run on thin air. As the unromantic embodiment of our digital economy, data centres are often a topic of debate. How many data centres can and does a small country like the Netherlands want to host?

metadata.chunk_id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0005
metadata.source_slug: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten
metadata.source_title: Energy reduction is a matter for the entire cloud chain

id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0006
text: A large share of those services runs from the cloud, or more concretely: on servers housed in mostly large-scale data centres. With their prominent place in the landscape and substantial electricity consumption, data centres underline what we already knew: the digital economy does not run on thin air. As the unromantic embodiment of our digital economy, data centres are often a topic of debate. How many data centres can and does a small country like the Netherlands want to host? Will we meet our Climate Agreement targets if we also want to be a European hub for data traffic?

metadata.chunk_id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0006
metadata.source_slug: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten
metadata.source_title: Energy reduction is a matter for the entire cloud chain

id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0007
text: With their prominent place in the landscape and substantial electricity consumption, data centres underline what we already knew: the digital economy does not run on thin air. As the unromantic embodiment of our digital economy, data centres are often a topic of debate. How many data centres can and does a small country like the Netherlands want to host? Will we meet our Climate Agreement targets if we also want to be a European hub for data traffic? At the same time, it is encouraging and motivating to see the steps the entire ICT chain is already taking to reduce the cloud’s ultimate energy consumption.

metadata.chunk_id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0007
metadata.source_slug: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten
metadata.source_title: Energy reduction is a matter for the entire cloud chain

id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0008
text: As the unromantic embodiment of our digital economy, data centres are often a topic of debate. How many data centres can and does a small country like the Netherlands want to host? Will we meet our Climate Agreement targets if we also want to be a European hub for data traffic? At the same time, it is encouraging and motivating to see the steps the entire ICT chain is already taking to reduce the cloud’s ultimate energy consumption. Opportunities lie in the data centre itself, the servers housed there, and the digital services that run on those servers.

metadata.chunk_id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0008
metadata.source_slug: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten
metadata.source_title: Energy reduction is a matter for the entire cloud chain

id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0009
text: How many data centres can and does a small country like the Netherlands want to host? Will we meet our Climate Agreement targets if we also want to be a European hub for data traffic? At the same time, it is encouraging and motivating to see the steps the entire ICT chain is already taking to reduce the cloud’s ultimate energy consumption. Opportunities lie in the data centre itself, the servers housed there, and the digital services that run on those servers. That at least some of those opportunities are already being seized is proven by the sharply increased efficiency of data centres.

metadata.chunk_id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0009
metadata.source_slug: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten
metadata.source_title: Energy reduction is a matter for the entire cloud chain

id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0010
text: Will we meet our Climate Agreement targets if we also want to be a European hub for data traffic? At the same time, it is encouraging and motivating to see the steps the entire ICT chain is already taking to reduce the cloud’s ultimate energy consumption. Opportunities lie in the data centre itself, the servers housed there, and the digital services that run on those servers. That at least some of those opportunities are already being seized is proven by the sharply increased efficiency of data centres. Global electricity consumption by data centres rose by only six per cent between 2010 and 2018, while data traffic to and from data centres increased tenfold and data storage capacity [rose by a factor of 25](https://www.gwern.net/docs/cs/2020-masanet.pdf).

metadata.chunk_id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0010
metadata.source_slug: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten
metadata.source_title: Energy reduction is a matter for the entire cloud chain

id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0011
text: At the same time, it is encouraging and motivating to see the steps the entire ICT chain is already taking to reduce the cloud’s ultimate energy consumption. Opportunities lie in the data centre itself, the servers housed there, and the digital services that run on those servers. That at least some of those opportunities are already being seized is proven by the sharply increased efficiency of data centres. Global electricity consumption by data centres rose by only six per cent between 2010 and 2018, while data traffic to and from data centres increased tenfold and data storage capacity [rose by a factor of 25](https://www.gwern.net/docs/cs/2020-masanet.pdf). Thanks to greater scale and the use of innovative, less energy-intensive cooling techniques, data centres are also keeping their own energy use well under control.

metadata.chunk_id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0011
metadata.source_slug: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten
metadata.source_title: Energy reduction is a matter for the entire cloud chain

id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0012
text: Opportunities lie in the data centre itself, the servers housed there, and the digital services that run on those servers. That at least some of those opportunities are already being seized is proven by the sharply increased efficiency of data centres. Global electricity consumption by data centres rose by only six per cent between 2010 and 2018, while data traffic to and from data centres increased tenfold and data storage capacity [rose by a factor of 25](https://www.gwern.net/docs/cs/2020-masanet.pdf). Thanks to greater scale and the use of innovative, less energy-intensive cooling techniques, data centres are also keeping their own energy use well under control. In theory, it is even possible to generate all electricity needed for cooling from the data centre’s own residual heat.

metadata.chunk_id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0012
metadata.source_slug: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten
metadata.source_title: Energy reduction is a matter for the entire cloud chain

id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0013
text: That at least some of those opportunities are already being seized is proven by the sharply increased efficiency of data centres. Global electricity consumption by data centres rose by only six per cent between 2010 and 2018, while data traffic to and from data centres increased tenfold and data storage capacity [rose by a factor of 25](https://www.gwern.net/docs/cs/2020-masanet.pdf). Thanks to greater scale and the use of innovative, less energy-intensive cooling techniques, data centres are also keeping their own energy use well under control. In theory, it is even possible to generate all electricity needed for cooling from the data centre’s own residual heat. Unfortunately, such a fully circular set-up is still one for the future, although residual heat is already regularly used externally, for example to heat a swimming pool or a block of flats.

metadata.chunk_id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0013
metadata.source_slug: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten
metadata.source_title: Energy reduction is a matter for the entire cloud chain

id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0014
text: Global electricity consumption by data centres rose by only six per cent between 2010 and 2018, while data traffic to and from data centres increased tenfold and data storage capacity [rose by a factor of 25](https://www.gwern.net/docs/cs/2020-masanet.pdf). Thanks to greater scale and the use of innovative, less energy-intensive cooling techniques, data centres are also keeping their own energy use well under control. In theory, it is even possible to generate all electricity needed for cooling from the data centre’s own residual heat. Unfortunately, such a fully circular set-up is still one for the future, although residual heat is already regularly used externally, for example to heat a swimming pool or a block of flats. The server owner also contributes to the relatively slow rise in energy use.

metadata.chunk_id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0014
metadata.source_slug: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten
metadata.source_title: Energy reduction is a matter for the entire cloud chain

id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0015
text: Thanks to greater scale and the use of innovative, less energy-intensive cooling techniques, data centres are also keeping their own energy use well under control. In theory, it is even possible to generate all electricity needed for cooling from the data centre’s own residual heat. Unfortunately, such a fully circular set-up is still one for the future, although residual heat is already regularly used externally, for example to heat a swimming pool or a block of flats. The server owner also contributes to the relatively slow rise in energy use. This can be a hosting company that rents space in a data centre, or a party that also owns the data centre itself, such as large cloud service providers like Microsoft and Google, or companies with their own IT infrastructure.

metadata.chunk_id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0015
metadata.source_slug: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten
metadata.source_title: Energy reduction is a matter for the entire cloud chain

id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0016
text: In theory, it is even possible to generate all electricity needed for cooling from the data centre’s own residual heat. Unfortunately, such a fully circular set-up is still one for the future, although residual heat is already regularly used externally, for example to heat a swimming pool or a block of flats. The server owner also contributes to the relatively slow rise in energy use. This can be a hosting company that rents space in a data centre, or a party that also owns the data centre itself, such as large cloud service providers like Microsoft and Google, or companies with their own IT infrastructure. Using newer models often already delivers gains in terms of higher capacity and reduced energy use.

metadata.chunk_id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0016
metadata.source_slug: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten
metadata.source_title: Energy reduction is a matter for the entire cloud chain

id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0017
text: Unfortunately, such a fully circular set-up is still one for the future, although residual heat is already regularly used externally, for example to heat a swimming pool or a block of flats. The server owner also contributes to the relatively slow rise in energy use. This can be a hosting company that rents space in a data centre, or a party that also owns the data centre itself, such as large cloud service providers like Microsoft and Google, or companies with their own IT infrastructure. Using newer models often already delivers gains in terms of higher capacity and reduced energy use. In addition to replacing hardware, smart use of it can also reduce electricity consumption.

metadata.chunk_id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0017
metadata.source_slug: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten
metadata.source_title: Energy reduction is a matter for the entire cloud chain

id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0018
text: The server owner also contributes to the relatively slow rise in energy use. This can be a hosting company that rents space in a data centre, or a party that also owns the data centre itself, such as large cloud service providers like Microsoft and Google, or companies with their own IT infrastructure. Using newer models often already delivers gains in terms of higher capacity and reduced energy use. In addition to replacing hardware, smart use of it can also reduce electricity consumption. For example, lightly used or idle servers consume a relatively large amount of power.

metadata.chunk_id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0018
metadata.source_slug: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten
metadata.source_title: Energy reduction is a matter for the entire cloud chain

id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0019
text: This can be a hosting company that rents space in a data centre, or a party that also owns the data centre itself, such as large cloud service providers like Microsoft and Google, or companies with their own IT infrastructure. Using newer models often already delivers gains in terms of higher capacity and reduced energy use. In addition to replacing hardware, smart use of it can also reduce electricity consumption. For example, lightly used or idle servers consume a relatively large amount of power. In such cases, you can limit energy use by switching on ‘eco mode’.

metadata.chunk_id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0019
metadata.source_slug: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten
metadata.source_title: Energy reduction is a matter for the entire cloud chain

id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0020
text: Using newer models often already delivers gains in terms of higher capacity and reduced energy use. In addition to replacing hardware, smart use of it can also reduce electricity consumption. For example, lightly used or idle servers consume a relatively large amount of power. In such cases, you can limit energy use by switching on ‘eco mode’. Using this (temporary) sleep mode delivered an [energy reduction](https://amsterdameconomicboard.com/nieuws/eco-mode-bespaart-extra-energie) of 7 per cent at KPN and had no noticeable impact on the performance of the servers concerned.

metadata.chunk_id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0020
metadata.source_slug: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten
metadata.source_title: Energy reduction is a matter for the entire cloud chain

id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0021
text: In addition to replacing hardware, smart use of it can also reduce electricity consumption. For example, lightly used or idle servers consume a relatively large amount of power. In such cases, you can limit energy use by switching on ‘eco mode’. Using this (temporary) sleep mode delivered an [energy reduction](https://amsterdameconomicboard.com/nieuws/eco-mode-bespaart-extra-energie) of 7 per cent at KPN and had no noticeable impact on the performance of the servers concerned. Finally, it pays to reduce the number of servers and increase their utilisation.

metadata.chunk_id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0021
metadata.source_slug: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten
metadata.source_title: Energy reduction is a matter for the entire cloud chain

id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0022
text: For example, lightly used or idle servers consume a relatively large amount of power. In such cases, you can limit energy use by switching on ‘eco mode’. Using this (temporary) sleep mode delivered an [energy reduction](https://amsterdameconomicboard.com/nieuws/eco-mode-bespaart-extra-energie) of 7 per cent at KPN and had no noticeable impact on the performance of the servers concerned. Finally, it pays to reduce the number of servers and increase their utilisation. You can do this through virtualisation.

metadata.chunk_id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0022
metadata.source_slug: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten
metadata.source_title: Energy reduction is a matter for the entire cloud chain

id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0023
text: In such cases, you can limit energy use by switching on ‘eco mode’. Using this (temporary) sleep mode delivered an [energy reduction](https://amsterdameconomicboard.com/nieuws/eco-mode-bespaart-extra-energie) of 7 per cent at KPN and had no noticeable impact on the performance of the servers concerned. Finally, it pays to reduce the number of servers and increase their utilisation. You can do this through virtualisation. One physical server then gets multiple virtual representations and can be used by multiple parties at the same time.

metadata.chunk_id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0023
metadata.source_slug: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten
metadata.source_title: Energy reduction is a matter for the entire cloud chain

id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0024
text: Using this (temporary) sleep mode delivered an [energy reduction](https://amsterdameconomicboard.com/nieuws/eco-mode-bespaart-extra-energie) of 7 per cent at KPN and had no noticeable impact on the performance of the servers concerned. Finally, it pays to reduce the number of servers and increase their utilisation. You can do this through virtualisation. One physical server then gets multiple virtual representations and can be used by multiple parties at the same time. Data centres and their servers are not there for show.

metadata.chunk_id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0024
metadata.source_slug: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten
metadata.source_title: Energy reduction is a matter for the entire cloud chain

id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0025
text: Finally, it pays to reduce the number of servers and increase their utilisation. You can do this through virtualisation. One physical server then gets multiple virtual representations and can be used by multiple parties at the same time. Data centres and their servers are not there for show. They host the websites we visit, give us access to software applications like Word and Netflix, and store our precious photos.

metadata.chunk_id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0025
metadata.source_slug: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten
metadata.source_title: Energy reduction is a matter for the entire cloud chain

id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0026
text: You can do this through virtualisation. One physical server then gets multiple virtual representations and can be used by multiple parties at the same time. Data centres and their servers are not there for show. They host the websites we visit, give us access to software applications like Word and Netflix, and store our precious photos. We call on servers in the cloud every day, which drives up data centres’ electricity consumption.

metadata.chunk_id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0026
metadata.source_slug: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten
metadata.source_title: Energy reduction is a matter for the entire cloud chain

id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0027
text: One physical server then gets multiple virtual representations and can be used by multiple parties at the same time. Data centres and their servers are not there for show. They host the websites we visit, give us access to software applications like Word and Netflix, and store our precious photos. We call on servers in the cloud every day, which drives up data centres’ electricity consumption. It is unlikely that users will stop using these cloud services for that reason, as they meet a need.

metadata.chunk_id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0027
metadata.source_slug: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten
metadata.source_title: Energy reduction is a matter for the entire cloud chain

id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0028
text: Data centres and their servers are not there for show. They host the websites we visit, give us access to software applications like Word and Netflix, and store our precious photos. We call on servers in the cloud every day, which drives up data centres’ electricity consumption. It is unlikely that users will stop using these cloud services for that reason, as they meet a need. But website and software developers can make changes to cut the amount of memory, data traffic or computing power their product requires.

metadata.chunk_id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0028
metadata.source_slug: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten
metadata.source_title: Energy reduction is a matter for the entire cloud chain

id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0029
text: They host the websites we visit, give us access to software applications like Word and Netflix, and store our precious photos. We call on servers in the cloud every day, which drives up data centres’ electricity consumption. It is unlikely that users will stop using these cloud services for that reason, as they meet a need. But website and software developers can make changes to cut the amount of memory, data traffic or computing power their product requires. You can already easily view websites’ CO₂ footprint via the [Website Carbon Calculator](https://www.websitecarbon.com/), and several methods exist to reduce that footprint.

metadata.chunk_id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0029
metadata.source_slug: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten
metadata.source_title: Energy reduction is a matter for the entire cloud chain

id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0030
text: We call on servers in the cloud every day, which drives up data centres’ electricity consumption. It is unlikely that users will stop using these cloud services for that reason, as they meet a need. But website and software developers can make changes to cut the amount of memory, data traffic or computing power their product requires. You can already easily view websites’ CO₂ footprint via the [Website Carbon Calculator](https://www.websitecarbon.com/), and several methods exist to reduce that footprint. Despite efforts in academia to develop a set of proven methods and guidelines, energy-aware programming is unfortunately still a [relatively unknown phenomenon](https://www.researchgate.net/publication/308789636_What_do_programmers_know_about_the_energy_consumption_of_software) for many software developers.

metadata.chunk_id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0030
metadata.source_slug: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten
metadata.source_title: Energy reduction is a matter for the entire cloud chain

id: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten__c5-sentence-window__0031
text: It is unlikely that users will stop using these cloud services for that reason, as they meet a need. But website and software developers can make changes to cut the amount of memory, data traffic or computing power their product requires. You can already easily view websites’ CO₂ footprint via the [Website Carbon Calculator](https://www.websitecarbon.com/), and several methods exist to reduce that footprint. Despite efforts in academia to develop a set of proven methods and guidelines, energy-aware programming is unfortunately still a [relatively unknown phenomenon](https://www.researchgate.net/publication/308789636_What_do_programmers_know_about_the_energy_consumption_of_software) for many software developers. At first glance, websites, software and data have no other form than the pixels on our phone, laptop or TV screens.

text:
Despite efforts in academia to develop a set of proven methods and guidelines, energy-aware programming is unfortunately still a [relatively unknown phenomenon](https://www.researchgate.net/publication/308789636_What_do_programmers_know_about_the_energy_consumption_of_software) for many software developers. At first glance, websites, software and data have no other form than the pixels on our phone, laptop or TV screens. That makes the link between the digital services we use and the associated energy consumption less obvious. Yet there is another, more eye-catching manifestation that continues to stir emotions: the data centres rising in the polders. These complexes are proof that our digital activities do have a footprint, and their dominant presence should spur all parties in the ICT chain to do their part. *This column previously appeared on [Emerce](https://www.emerce.nl/achtergrond/energiereductie-is-een-zaak-van-de-hele-cloud-keten).*
